headline: PPG Industries Highlights Aerospace Progress Leadership Changes And Valuation Context
summary: PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) recently highlighted its Aerospace segment at a dedicated analyst event, focusing on new technologies such as 3D printed sealants and chrome free coatings. The company also announced John Smith as vice president of architectural coatings for EMEA, adding a new regional leader to its coatings portfolio. In addition, Alisha Bellezza was recognized as a finalist for Leader of the Year in the automotive industry, reflecting external acknowledgment of PPG's executive...
